title: BorderSRV
description: A simple plugin which works with DiscordSRV to get the world border value transmitted to a discord channel.
body:
BorderSRV currently only works with DiscordSRV 1.27.0-SNAPSHOT and has been only tested on 1.20.2 Paper/Purpur. BorderSRV will link itself to your discordsrv bot and will send a message in a set channel telling you the world border value. You can also setup the update interval time in the config file.

If you need help with this plugin, contact me on discord at callmerubriq
